name: New Munich Bus Svc Inc
owner_or_parent: independent (Williams family / Williams Bus Service Inc DBA)
principals: Williams family (Williams Bus Service Inc operates DBA New Munich Bus Service Inc per USDOT 945528)
districts_or_customers: Likely serves Albany / Melrose / Freeport / Holdingford area schools in central Stearns County, MN
recent_news: Active intrastate non-hazmat passenger carrier per FMCSA (USDOT 945528); no M&A news located
fit_notes: Small family-owned MN operator (~14 buses) co-located with Williams Bus Service at same Freeport CR 11 address; classic micro tuck-in candidate for Summit if MN platform exists. Succession signals not visible online.

name: Rustad School Bus Inc
principals: Rustad family (multi-generational; affiliated Rustad Tours / Rustad Bus Service)
recent_news: Family-owned since 1947; expanded from school buses into charter and motorcoach tours under Rustad Tours brand; no M&A news located
fit_notes: Long-tenured (1947) family operator with both school-bus contract (KMS district) and motorcoach/charter arm; classic rural MN tuck-in with potential succession given decades of family ownership. Charter side could be divested or retained.

name: Gravel Hill Community Bus Inc
owner_or_parent: unknown (Thomas W Alford listed as Other in records)
principals: Thomas W Alford (per source data; role unverified)
districts_or_customers: Possibly affiliated with Greenwood Leflore Consolidated School District or local community/church transport in Leflore County, MS
recent_news: No public news, website, or M&A activity located; name suggests a small community/church-affiliated bus entity rather than a commercial contractor
fit_notes: Very low online footprint; name 'Community Bus' implies possible church/community non-commercial entity rather than a contracted operator. MS public school transport is largely district-run, which weakens tuck-in thesis. Needs phone diligence before pursuing.

name: Reading School Bus
districts_or_customers: Possibly Rutherford County Schools (Forest City, NC); not confirmed
recent_news: No public news, website, contracts, or directory listings located
fit_notes: NC public schools generally run transport in-house through district fleets, so contractor model is rare; entity at residential Forest City address with no web presence suggests possible misclassified record or very small family operation. Low priority without further validation.

name: Gila School Bus Svc LLC
principals: Alan M Aragon (Manager / contractor; also serves as local fire chief per LinkedIn)
districts_or_customers: Likely contracts to Reserve Independent Schools or Quemado/Catron County area schools (remote western NM)
recent_news: No M&A or growth news located; owner Alan Aragon also fire chief in Aragon, NM (rural community)
fit_notes: Single-owner micro contractor in Catron County (one of the most remote counties in lower 48); too small and geographically isolated to be a meaningful tuck-in for Summit unless part of a broader NM rollup strategy. Likely sub-scale.
